meaning: 安徽(位于中国东部、长江下游)
examples: Wang Xiangjun is the first blind student to take gaokao in Anhui.
There are many beautiful places to visit in Anhui, especially Mount Huang in autumn.
Wu is spoken in Shanghai, most of Zhejiang and the southern parts of Jiangsu and Anhui.
The provinces of Jiangsu, Zhejiang, Fujian and Anhui are bracing for severe power shortages this summer.
But China's own brands - like Anhui-based Geely and Zhejiang-based Chery - are gaining ground.
